name: Lark/Feishu CLI
description: Integrates the official @larksuite/cli (NOT @byted-apaas/cli) as LLM-callable tools — manage Calendar, Messenger, Docs, Drive, Sheets, Base, Tasks, Wiki, Contact, Mail, and Meetings via the Feishu/Lark Open Platform CLI. One-click quickstart setup, no manual tenant ID input needed.
author: OpenAkita Team
